data.title: EU-India Trade Agreement Sparks Criticism from US Treasury Secretary
data.description:
The European Union has concluded a significant trade agreement with India, aimed at reducing tariffs and enhancing market access. According to NS3.AI, this development has drawn criticism from US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, who argues that the deal undermines US foreign policy. Bessent claims that Europe is taking advantage of US financial support for Ukraine while simultaneously engaging in separate trade negotiations with India, which include Russian oil purchases.

Indian officials have responded by asserting that the EU agreement does not compromise India's robust trade relationship with the United States. The US continues to work on its own trade agreements with India, indicating ongoing efforts to strengthen bilateral economic ties.

data.title: CZ Shares Cautious View on Bitcoin Supercycle Amid Rising Global Uncertainty
data.description: Changpeng Zhao (CZ), founder and former CEO of Binance, shared a more cautious outlook on the idea of a Bitcoin supercycle during a recent AMA session on Binance Square, citing rising uncertainty across global markets.CZ said that only a few weeks ago, he felt highly confident that Bitcoin was entering a long-term supercycle — a period characterized by sustained price growth with fewer deep drawdowns. However, his view has since become less certain as macroeconomic and geopolitical pressures intensify.“Couple weeks ago, I was very confident about the supercycle,” CZ said. “But now with all that FUD, I’m not sure.”Rising FUD and Global Volatility Cloud Market OutlookCZ pointed to the current global environment as a key factor behind his reassessment. He noted that the world is experiencing unusually high levels of volatility, making it increasingly difficult to predict market outcomes — not only for crypto, but across all asset classes.“We live globally in a very volatile time,” he said, adding that uncertainty has made forecasting future market direction far more complex than before.Bitcoin has historically been sensitive to macro developments, including inflation expectations, monetary policy shifts, and geopolitical tensions — factors that have intensified in recent months.

data.title: CZ Says User Protection Remains Binance’s Top Priority Despite Market FUD
data.description: In a recent AMA session on Binance Square, Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) emphasized that the exchange continues to place user protection at the center of its operations, even amid ongoing market uncertainty and external criticism.CZ stated that Binance consistently goes “above and beyond” industry standards to safeguard users’ assets, data, and trading environment — a commitment he says is reflected in the platform’s long-term growth.According to CZ, Binance has now surpassed 300 million users globally, highlighting sustained trust from the crypto community despite periods of intense FUD across the industry.He added that Binance’s focus remains on security, compliance, transparency, and product resilience, rather than short-term narratives or market noise.

data.title: CZ: The recent attacks against him personally were carried out by a large number of online trolls.
data.description: In an AMA, CZ stated that the recent attacks against him personally were carried out by online trolls. These trolls launch these attacks for a fee. CZ specifically advised KOLs not to participate in such activities, pointing out that in the long run, participation will lead to losses.

data.title: Schumer Urges DOJ to Drop Powell Investigation to Advance Walsh Nomination
data.description: U.S. Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has called on the Department of Justice to cease its investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. According to Jin10, Schumer stated that if the DOJ does not halt its probe, Republicans will be unable to proceed with the nomination of Walsh. This development highlights the ongoing political tensions surrounding key appointments and investigations within the U.S. government.

data.title: Schumer Warns Against Advancing Walsh Nomination Amid Powell Charges
data.description: Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer has issued a warning regarding the nomination of Walsh. According to BlockBeats, Schumer stated on January 31 that Republicans should not proceed with Walsh's nomination if the Department of Justice does not drop charges against Powell.

data.title: Federal Reserve Board Member Predicts Successor
data.description: Federal Reserve Board member Milan announced on January 31 that Walsh is expected to succeed him on the board. According to BlockBeats, Milan described Walsh as an "excellent choice."

data.title: CZ: Binance does not participate in trading. The claim that Binance deliberately dumped shares, causing the October 11th crash, is nonsense.
data.description: In his AMA, CZ stated that Binance does not participate in trading and has defensive mechanisms and funds in place. He argued that an attacker would need billions of dollars to carry out a price manipulation attack, and he believes no one could have done so. Therefore, the claim that Binance deliberately sold off its holdings, causing the 10.11 crash, is untrue.

data.title: U.S. Department of Justice Releases Additional Epstein Files
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has released a substantial amount of new documents related to Jeffrey Epstein. According to Jin10, the Deputy Attorney General announced that over three million pages of documents have been compiled. This collection includes 2,000 video recordings and 180,000 images associated with Epstein.

data.title: Opinion: The market views Warsh's appointment as Federal Reserve Chairman as a negative signal for Bitcoin.
data.description: Markus Thielen, founder of 10x Research, stated that the market generally views Kevin Warsh's return as a negative signal for Bitcoin. Warsh's emphasis on monetary discipline, raising real interest rates, and advocating for reduced liquidity have led to cryptocurrencies being seen as a speculative surplus that will dissipate when loose monetary policy ends, rather than a hedge against currency devaluation. Warsh previously raised concerns about inflation risks during the 2008 financial crisis and criticized quantitative easing. Currently, Trump is demanding rapid interest rate cuts, which conflict with Warsh's historically hawkish stance, leading some analysts to doubt his ability to cooperate with future rate-cutting policies.

data.title: Nomura's Laser Digital Holdings Reduces Crypto Exposure Amid Market Volatility
data.description: Nomura Holdings' European digital asset subsidiary, Laser Digital Holdings, is reducing its exposure to cryptocurrency assets. According to PANews, this decision comes after the company experienced losses in the third quarter due to market fluctuations. Hiroshi Morinouchi, Nomura's Chief Financial Officer, stated during a financial briefing that the firm is implementing strict position management to mitigate risks. Despite these adjustments, Morinouchi emphasized that Nomura remains committed to its digital asset ventures and plans to expand its operations in the medium to long term.

data.title: The United States announced new sanctions against Iran.
data.description: On January 30 local time, the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) issued a notice updating its counterterrorism and counterproliferation sanctions list related to Iran, adding several high-ranking individuals from Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and law enforcement system to the "Specially Designated Nationals" (SDN) list. The notice indicates that the newly added individuals include commanders of the IRGC in several Iranian provinces, heads of the IRGC's intelligence organization, and high-ranking officials in law enforcement. Most of these individuals also face the risk of secondary sanctions. (CCTV News)

data.title: U.S. Military Slows Transfer of ISIS Detainees to Iraq
data.description: The U.S. military has reportedly slowed the transfer of ISIS detainees to Iraq this week. According to Jin10, Iraq is seeking additional time to prepare its prison facilities and negotiate with other countries regarding the repatriation of detainees.

data.title: Significant Increase in ETH and HYPE Holdings Observed
data.description: On January 30, a notable increase in ETH and HYPE holdings was observed. According to BlockBeats, HyperInsight monitoring revealed that 'Maji' has been consistently adding to its long positions in ETH and HYPE. The recent additions include 1,080 ETH and 8,888.88 HYPE, with further accumulation ongoing. As of the report's release, the value of these new long positions has approached $5 million.

data.title: Anonymous Transfer of 10,000 BNB to Wintermute Reported
data.description: At 23:20, an anonymous address beginning with 0xB0Ea transferred 10,000 BNB to Wintermute. According to ChainCatcher, the transaction was noted by Arkham data. The transfer highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market.
